nasb.text: But if you bite and devour one another, take care that you are not consumed by one another.

esv.text: But if you bite and devour one another, watch out that you are not consumed by one another.

cnv.text: 你們要謹慎，如果相咬相吞，恐怕彼此都要毀滅了。

ccb.text: 你们要谨慎，如果你们相咬相吞，恐怕会同归于尽。

csbs.text: 你们要当心！如果你们继续相咬相吞，恐怕就要彼此毁灭了。
